text:
V0100D_PRIOR_BIMS_SCRE_NUM V0100D Prior Assessment Brief Interview for Mental Status (BIMS) Summary Score Number CHAR 2 The data in this column contains the BIMS summary score from the most recent prior OBRA or PPS assessment.
563 V0100E_PRIOR_MOOD_SCRE_NUM V0100E_PRIOR_MOOD_SCRE_NUM V0100E Prior Assessment Resident Mood Interview (PHQ-9) Total Severity Score Number CHAR 2 The data in this column contains the resident mood interview (PHQ-9) total severity score from the most recent prior OBRA
